ideas.name: license-check
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: An Apache-2.0 compliance checker that verifies the LICENSE file hash against a known SHA256, scans source files for SPDX headers, validates THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES completeness, and cross-checks the entire IPM dependency graph for license compatibility.

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Queries the IPM dependency graph via libpq for license compatibility cross-checking

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Links cJSON for structured JSON output of license compliance reports

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Links OpenSSL for SHA256 hash computation when verifying LICENSE file integrity

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Dynamic-link glibc for standard C runtime interfaces — validates against the full transitive dependency closure for deterministic license compatibility enforcement
